caption: A man with a tall, spiked silver wig and glasses is seated in a studio, wearing a white long-sleeved shirt with a red bow tie and a gold-colored strap across his chest. He wears large black headphones and sits behind a black microphone on a boom arm. The background consists of a wall decorated with numerous framed photographs and a black clothing rack holding garments, including one with "LEE" visible. The logo "BOSS TALK JOY PODCAST" is displayed on the left and right sides of the screen. Across the sequence, the man remains in a similar position, speaking into the microphone with slight variations in his facial expression and head tilt. His right hand is partially visible resting on the table in front of him. The overall setting remains static as the man continues his dialogue.
